name: erfana-skills
description: A Claude Code toolkit marketplace — design + orchestration + verification skills, plus 87 shared agents.

plugins.name: erfana
plugins.description: A Claude Code toolkit for design and orchestration: six design skills + six orchestration skills (Modernize op + Display op in managing-issues) + one process skill (grill-me) + one verification skill (fact-checking) + 87 shared agents (per-agent effort/model overrides, including fc-* quartet) + using-erfana router + four safety hooks + five slash commands (doc-update, project-status, session-status, lens-review, explain-issue)
